response.justification: Bogdan demonstrates extensive full-stack experience with deep expertise in TypeScript, Node.js, React, and modern architectures, including AI-agent infrastructure and Kubernetes deployment. His roles show consistent leadership in complex systems, testing practices, and cross-functional collaboration. While his secondary stack includes Dlang and Swift, his primary focus aligns strongly with the required TypeScript and React stack.
strengths: Deep expertise in TypeScript, Node.js, and React with recent work in AI-agent infrastructure
Proven ability to design scalable systems (e.g., Direct Mail automation platform handling millions of mails)
Strong focus on testing, CI/CD, and DevOps practices (e.g., trunk-based development, GitLab CI)
concerns: Limited direct experience with Nest.js, though Node.js expertise likely translates well
Secondary skills like Kotlin/Java are mentioned but not recent or primary focus
Some roles include non-primary technologies (e.g., Dlang) which may indicate less specialization in required stacks
